KnownPerson.title: Known Person
KnownPerson.description: A person recognized and named by the user.

description.description: A brief visual description of the person to help with future recognition.

uid.description: The UID of the user who saved this person.

createdAt.description: When this person was first named.

EmergencyContact.title: Emergency Contact
EmergencyContact.description: The user's pre-defined emergency contact information.

phone.description: The phone number of the contact.

email.description: The email address of the contact.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this contact.

ConversationMessage.title: Conversation Message
ConversationMessage.description: A single message in the user's conversation history with the assistant.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this message.

/known_people.description: Collection of people the user has named and saved.

/emergency_contacts/{uid}.description: User's emergency contact information, keyed by user UID.

/conversation_history.description: User's conversation history with the assistant.
